activities.name: Copy data Load Medallia EDW Invitations

source.sqlReaderQuery:
With GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,J.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM 
		ODS.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_INVITATION G
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.BRAND=J.DIVISION AND G.EXTERNAL_ID=J.CONTRACTID AND Round(G.VALUE,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')

),
GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
			SELECT DISTINCT
				G.SURVEY_ID,G.RESPONSE_DATE,G.EXTERNAL_ID,G.VALUE AS AMOUNT,G.BRAND,COALESCE(C1.CUSTOMERID,C.CUSTOMERID--,C2.CUSTOMERID,C3.CUSTOMERID
				) AS CUSTOMERID
				FROM 
				ODS.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_INVITATION G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  G.BRAND=C1.DIVISION
												AND G.CONTACT=CONCAT(C1.FIRSTNAME,' ',C1.LASTNAME) 
												AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 
												AND G.CITY=C1.CITY 
												AND G.STATE=C1.STATE
												AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
												AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C1.PHONE
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C ON G.BRAND=C.DIVISION AND G.EMAIL=C.EMAIL
				WHERE T.Survey_id is null 
		 ) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND G.BRAND=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)---5555
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
	
),

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3 AS 
(
SELECT G.SURVEY_ID,G.CUSTOMERID,J.LEADID,J.JOBID, 
	   J.LP_CUSTOMERID,J.LP_LEADID, 
	   J.INSTALLERID_1,J.InstallerID_2,J.InstallerID_3,J.InstallerID_4,
	   J.LP_INSTALLERID_1,J.LP_InstallerID_2,J.LP_InstallerID_3,J.LP_InstallerID_4 
	FROM (
		Select G.Brand,G.Survey_ID,G.EXTERNAL_ID,
			   G.Value as Amount, 
		       Coalesce(C1.CustomerID,C2.CustomerID) as CustomerID
			from ODS.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_INVITATION G
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1 T on G.Survey_Id=T.Survey_ID	 
				LEFT JOIn GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2 T1 on G.Survey_Id=T1.Survey_ID
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C1 ON  G.BRAND=C1.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C1.ADDRESS1 AND G.ZIP=C1.ZIP
				LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_CUSTOMER C2 ON  G.BRAND=C2.DIVISION AND G.ADDRESS=C2.ADDRESS1 AND  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(G.PHONE,'(',''),') ',''),'-','')=C2.PHONE
			where T.Survey_id is null and T1.Survey_id is null

		) G 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB J ON G.CUSTOMERID=J.CUSTOMERID AND G.BRAND=J.DIVISION AND Round(G.AMOUNT,2) =Round(J.GROSSAMOUNT,2)
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS ON J.DIVISION=JS.DIVISION AND J.JobStatusId=JS.JobStatusID
		
	WHERE J.JOBID IS NOT NULL  AND JS.LP_JOBSTATUSCATEGORYID not in ('3','5')
),

GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD AS 
(
Select * 
from 
	(	
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_1
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_2
		UNION ALL
		Select * from GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_3
	)A 
),	

GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL AS 
(
Select 
	G.Survey_ID,
	Response_date,
	G.Program,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING(Contact, 1, LEN(Contact) - CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)))  ELSE Contact  END AS First_Name,
	CASE  WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', Contact) > 0 THEN REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(Contact), 1, CHARINDEX(' ', REVERSE(Contact)) - 1))  ELSE Contact  END AS Last_Name,
	EMAIL as Email_Address,
	Replace(Replace(Replace(Phone,'(',''),')',''),'-','') as Phone_number,
	GD.LP_LEADID	as Lead_ID,
	NULL			as Product_line_InstallationExperience,
	NULL			as Date_to_survey,
	'Usa'			as Country,
	'English'		as Language, 
	NULL			as Account,
	NULL			as Unit,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID  ,
	Brand			as Brand_name,
	NULL			as Sales_REP_ID_2,
	NULL			as Sales_branch_name, 
	NULL			as Sold,
	NULL			as Appointment_Date,
	Development_Cycle,
	NULL 			as 	Sales_Organization,
	NULL 			as 	Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
	NULL 			as 	Main_Metric,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Datetime,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_ID,
	NULL 			as 	Service_Technician_Name   ,
	NULL 			as 	Account_ID   ,
	External_ID   	as 	Contract_ID,
	Channel,
	NULL 			as Production_branch_name   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market   ,
	NULL 			as Reporting_Market_Type   ,
	NULL 			as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience   ,
	NULL 			as Social_Unit_ID   ,
	SalesRepresentative,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_2   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_3   ,
	NULL 			as Service_Technician_4   ,
    Surveystatus,
	Creationdate as CreationDate,
	NULL as ExpiryDate,
	Brand as Division,
	Template,
	Old_Survey_Id,
	Value,
	ContactCreationDate,
	ProjectStartDate,
	SecondaryEmail 			   	  	 as SecondaryEmail							,
	SecondaryPhone 			      	 as SecondaryPhone							,
	NeedsAction 			      	 as Needs_Action  							,
	Notes 					      	 as Notes										,
	GoogleReviewBoost		      	 as Google_Review_Boost						,
	'Guild Quality' as SurveyFlag  ,
	GD.JOBID,
	GD.CUSTOMERID,
	GD.LEADID AS EDW_LeadID,
	GD.LP_CUSTOMERID,
	--GD.LP_LEADID, 
	GD.INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.InstallerID_2,
	GD.InstallerID_3,
	GD.InstallerID_4,
	GD.LP_INSTALLERID_1,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_2,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_3,
	GD.LP_InstallerID_4 
		FROM ODS.GUILD_QUALITY_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_INVITATION G
				LEFT JOIN GUILD_QUALITY_WITH_LEAD GD on G.Survey_ID=GD.SURVEY_ID

),
MEDALLIA_DATA AS 
(
	
	Select 
		A.* , 
		
		NULL as Template,
		NULL as Old_Survey_Id,
		NULL as Value,
		NULL as Contact_CreationDate,
		NULL as ProjectStartDate,
		NULL as SecondaryEmail							,
        NULL as SecondaryPhone							,
        NULL as Needs_Action  							,
        NULL as Notes										,
        NULL as Google_Review_Boost						,
       
		'Medallia' as SurveyFlag ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.JOBID,LJ_2.JOBID)                 AS  JOBID ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.CUSTOMERID,LJ_2.CUSTOMERID)       AS  CUSTOMERID ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LEADID,LJ_2.LEADID)              AS   EDW_LEADID ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LP_CUSTOMERID,LJ_2.LP_CUSTOMERID) AS  LP_CUSTOMERID ,
		--A.LP_LEADID, 
		COALESCE(LJ_1.INSTALLERID_1,LJ_2.INSTALLERID_1 ) AS INSTALLERID_1    		,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.InstallerID_2,LJ_2.INSTALLERID_2 ) AS INSTALLERID_2           ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.InstallerID_3,LJ_2.INSTALLERID_3 ) AS INSTALLERID_3           ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.InstallerID_4,LJ_2.INSTALLERID_4 ) AS INSTALLERID_4           ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LP_INSTALLERID_1,LJ_2.LP_INSTALLERID_1 ) AS LP_INSTALLERID_1  ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LP_InstallerID_2,LJ_2.LP_INSTALLERID_2 ) AS LP_INSTALLERID_2  ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LP_InstallerID_3,LJ_2.LP_INSTALLERID_3 ) AS LP_INSTALLERID_3  ,
		COALESCE(LJ_1.LP_InstallerID_4,LJ_2.LP_INSTALLERID_4 ) AS LP_INSTALLERID_4
		
			from  ( SELECT *,
						CASE 
							WHEN Brand_name='Mad City Windows & Baths'	THEN 'MAC'
							WHEN Brand_name='Pacific Bath'				THEN 'PBC'
							WHEN Brand_name='Statewide Remodeling'		THEN 'SWR'
							WHEN Brand_name='FHIA Remodeling'			THEN 'FHI'
							WHEN Brand_name='Max Home'					THEN 'MXH'
							WHEN Brand_name='Rite Window & Door'		THEN 'RTW'
							WHEN Brand_name='Paradise Home Improvement' THEN 'PHI'
							When Brand_name='Home Smart'				THEN 'HSI'
							WHEN Brand_name='Renuity'					THEN 'PHI'
                            WHEN Brand_Name='Closet America'            THEN 'CTA' 
						END AS Division
						FROM ODS.MEDALLIA_CUSTOMER_SURVEY_INVITATION
						) A 
					LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB LJ_1 ON (A.Lead_ID = LJ_1.LP_LeadID AND A.Division = LJ_1.Division) 
			
					LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_JOB LJ_2 ON  A.Contract_ID = LJ_2.ContractID AND A.Division = LJ_2.Division
)


Select B.*,NULL as UpdatedAt, NULL as LastActivityAt from (
SELECT DIstinct 
M1.Survey_ID,
M1.Response_Date,
cast(M1.Program as varchar(256)) 																													 as Program,
M1.CustomerID,
M1.LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Sales_Rep_ID) ELSE LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) 	 AS SalesRep1_EmployeeID,
cast(LD_M.SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256)) 																									 as SalesRep2_EmployeeID,
LD_M.BranchID,
LD_M.ApptDate,
Cast(M1.ContractID as varchar(256))																													 as ContractID,
Cast(M1.Division as varchar(32))              																									     as Division,
Cast(CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.Service_Technician_ID) ELSE M1.InstallerID_1 END as varchar(100)) AS InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																												 as InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.Product_Line_InstallationExperience as varchar(256)) 																						 as Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
M1.Date_To_Survey,
cast(M1.Country  as varchar(32)) 																													 as Country,
cast(M1.Language as varchar(32)) 																													 as Language,
Cast(M1.Unit as INT) as Unit,
M1.Sold,
Cast(M1.DevelopmentCycle  as varchar(256)) 																											 as DevelopmentCycle,
Cast(M1.SalesOrganization as varchar(256)) 																											 as SalesOrganization,  
cast(M1.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations as varchar(256)) 																						 as Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
cast(M1.Main_Metric as INT) 																														 as Main_Metric,
M1.Service_Datetime,
cast(M1.Channel as varchar(256)) 																													 as Channel ,
cast(M1.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience as varchar(256)) 																					 as Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
Cast(M1.Social_Unit_ID as varchar(256)) 																											 as Social_Unit_ID,
cast(M1.Template   as varchar(100))                               														as Template,	
cast(M1.GuildQuality_Survey_Id    as varchar(100))               														as GuildQuality_Survey_Id,
Cast(ISNULL(M1.Amount,0) as Decimal(16,2)) 																				as Amount                                    ,
cast(M1.Survey_status   as varchar(100))                            													as Survey_status ,
cast(M1.Customer_Creation_Date   as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Customer_Creation_Date                   ,
cast(M1.Project_Start_Date       as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Project_Start_Date                       ,
cast(M1.Creationdate             as [datetime2](7)) 																	as Creationdate                             ,
cast(M1.ExpiryDate             as [datetime2](7)) 																	as ExpiryDate                             ,
cast(M1.Needs_Action  	as varchar(8000)) 																			as Needs_Action						,
cast(M1.Notes	as varchar(8000))							                                                            as Notes                           ,
cast(M1.Google_Review_Boost as varchar(8000))				                                                            as Google_Review_Boost             ,
cast(M1.SurveyFlag as varchar(100))																						as SurveyFlag	 ,																																		------------------- ends here
cast(M1.LP_CustomerID as varchar(256))																					as LP_CustomerID,
cast(M1.LP_LeadID     as varchar(256))																					as LP_LeadID,
cast(CASE WHEN M1.Sales_Rep_ID is not null then M1.Sales_Rep_ID ELSE LD_M.LP_SalesRep1_EmployeeID END as varchar(256)) as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_1,
cast(LD_M.LP_SalesRep2_EmployeeID as varchar(256))																		as LP_SalesRepEmployeeID_2,
cast(LD_M.LP_BranchID as varchar(50))																					as LP_BranchID,
CASE WHEN M1.Service_Technician_ID is not null then M1.Service_Technician_ID ELSE M1.LP_InstallerID_1 END			    as LP_InstallerID_1,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_2 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_2,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_3 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_3,
cast(M1.LP_InstallerID_4 as varchar(100)) 																				as LP_InstallerID_4,
Cast(M1.LastUpdatedTs as [datetime2](7)) 																				as LastUpdatedTs,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketID		   as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketID	   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketID		,
cast(M1.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
cast(M1.ReportingMarketTypeID      as varchar(100)) 																	as ReportingMarketTypeID   ,
cast(LD_M.ProductID				   as varchar(100)) 																	as ProductID				,
cast(LD_M.LP_ProductID			   as varchar(100)) 																	as LP_ProductID			,
cast(M1.Account 				   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_AccountID,
cast(M1.Sales_Rep_ID 			   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_SalesRepID1,
cast(M1.Service_Technician_ID 	   as varchar(100)) 																	as Medallia_ServiceTechID1,
cast(COALESCE(M1.Active,DE.Active) as varchar(10))																		as SalesRepActiveFlag , 		--into #T_Fact_medallia,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY M1.Survey_ID ORDER BY LD_M.EntryDate DESC) as rownum
FROM 
(

		SELECT 
				A.Survey_ID,
				A.Response_Date,
				A.Program,
				A.CustomerID,
				A.EDW_LeadID AS LEADID,
				A.Contract_ID AS ContractID,
				A.Division,
				A.InstallerID_1,
				A.InstallerID_2,
				A.InstallerID_3,
				A.InstallerID_4,
				A.Product_Line_InstallationExperience,
				A.Date_To_Survey,
				A.Country,
				A.[Language],
				A.Unit,
				Case when A.sold is NULL 	then '0'
					 when A.Sold='Not Sold' then '0' 
					 Else '1' END as Sold,
				A.Development_Cycle  as DevelopmentCycle,
				A.Sales_Organization as SalesOrganization,
				A.Record_Type_Medallia_Conversations,
				A.Main_Metric,
				A.Service_Datetime,
				A.Channel,
				A.Product_Line_InHomeConsultationExperience,
                A.Sales_Rep_ID,
                A.Service_Technician_ID,
				A.Social_Unit_ID,
				A.Template                                  ,
				A.Old_Survey_ID as GuildQuality_Survey_Id                    ,
				A.Value 		as Amount                                    ,
				A.Survey_status                             ,
				A.Contact_creationDate  as Customer_Creation_Date                    ,
				A.ProjectStartDate 		as Project_Start_Date                        ,
				A.CreationDate  as CreationDate                            ,
				A.ExpiryDate											,
				A.Needs_Action  									 ,
				A.Notes								             ,
				A.Google_Review_Boost					             ,
				A.SurveyFlag   				                 ,
				A.LP_CustomerID,
				A.Lead_ID AS LP_LEADID,
				A.LP_InstallerID_1,
				A.LP_InstallerID_2,
				A.LP_InstallerID_3,
				A.LP_InstallerID_4,
				GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTs,
				B.ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketID,
				B.LP_ReportingMarketTypeID,
				B.ReportingMarketTypeID,
                NULL  as Active, 
                A.ACCOUNT
				
				
			FROM  
				(	SELECT * FROM MEDALLIA_DATA
					UNION ALL
					SELECT * FROM GUILD_QUALITY_DATA_FINAL
				) A
			 
			LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B 
			ON A.Production_branch_name=B.LongName AND A.Division = B.Division
			--Where A.Survey_ID='303024'

	
	) M1
	
	LEFT JOIN EDW.FACT_LEAD LD_M ON M1.LeadID = LD_M.LeadID
    LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE DE ON LD_M.SalesRep1_EmployeeID=DE.EmployeeID) B
	where B.rownum=1
